principle: time follows the whole scene and all active characters, not only Akira's action and not turn count

rule.not_per_turn: Do not use one turn equals one minute.
rule.not_only_akira: Do not calculate time only from Akira's explicit action.
rule.advance_by_whole_scene: Advance time by all visible/nearby scene activity: Akira's actions, Akira's thoughts/pauses, NPC speech, NPC actions, pauses, pressure, movement, waiting, and consequences.
rule.parallel_activity_counts: If Akira is occupied for one minute, NPCs are not frozen; they may act/speak during that minute, and further exchanges after that add more time.
rule.silence_counts: If Akira pauses/thinks/waits/listens, the scene continues and NPCs may spend time acting.
rule.npc_actions_count: NPC dialogue, movement, energy use, hesitation, argument and reaction pauses count toward scene duration.
rule.no_freeze: Do not keep time fixed unless the scene explicitly contains instant/near-instant reaction.
rule.header_time_is_scene_end: The time shown in the scene header/status must be the time reached by the END of the generated scene, not the time at the beginning of the turn.
rule.state_time_update: current_time/current_scene_time must be updated to scene_end_time after the output.

scene_clock.start_time: time at beginning of processed turn
scene_clock.scene_duration: all seconds/minutes consumed by the generated scene, including NPC actions
scene_clock.header_rule: Use scene_end_time in the header/top status after generation.
scene_clock.bottom_status_rule: If there is a status block, it must also reflect scene_end_time.
scene_clock.do_not_show: Do not show the old start_time as current time after several in-scene actions happened.

npcs: off-screen but nearby actions if they affect the scene

duration_composition_examples.bad: Akira acted for 1 minute, therefore total scene time is 1 minute.
duration_composition_examples.good: Akira acted for 1 minute, then Emma spoke, Irey intervened, Jun paused and moved, so total scene time is 3-4 minutes.
duration_composition_examples.header_bad: Header repeats the old start time.
duration_composition_examples.header_good: Header shows the time reached after the scene's actions.

start_scene_anchor.warning: 02:40 is only the start anchor. After several replies, looks, pauses, NPC actions and movement, 02:43-02:47 may be plausible.
